_description: Example WhatsApp Business API webhook payload — POST request received by the n8n Webhook node when a user sends a text message. This is the raw JSON that Meta's servers send to your webhook URL. The n8n Message Parser node extracts: contacts[0].wa_id (sender phone), contacts[0].profile.name (sender name), messages[0].text.body (message content), messages[0].id (message ID for reply), and metadata.phone_number_id (your WhatsApp phone number ID, required for sending replies).

_examples._note: Alternative message types the bot may receive. The Message Parser node handles 'text' only by default and sends an informational reply for all other types.

location.name: São Paulo, SP
location.address: Av. Paulista, 1000 - Bela Vista, São Paulo - SP

webhook_verification_get._note: This is NOT a POST body — it is a GET request from Meta to verify your webhook. n8n handles this automatically via the Webhook node query parameters.

_field_reference.entry[0].id: Your WhatsApp Business Account ID (WABA ID) — found in Meta Business Manager
_field_reference.entry[0].changes[0].value.metadata.displ: The phone number displayed to users (human-readable format)
_field_reference.entry[0].changes[0].value.metadata.phone: The numeric phone number ID — REQUIRED when sending replies via the API
_field_reference.entry[0].changes[0].value.contacts[0].pr: The display name of the sender as stored in their WhatsApp profile
_field_reference.entry[0].changes[0].value.contacts[0].wa: The sender's phone number in international format without '+' (e.g., 5511999887766 for +55 11 99988-7766)
_field_reference.entry[0].changes[0].value.messages[0].fr: Same as wa_id — the sender's phone number
_field_reference.entry[0].changes[0].value.messages[0].id: Unique message ID (wamid) — used for sending read receipts or referencing the message
_field_reference.entry[0].changes[0].value.messages[0].ti: Unix timestamp (seconds) of when the message was sent
_field_reference.entry[0].changes[0].value.messages[0].te: The actual text content of the message — this is what the bot reads and responds to
